name: agent-fixture
description: Deterministic OpenCode agent tasks over a small checkout service fixture. The tasks cover code finding, call navigation, and edits with post-condition scoring.

tasks.prompt: Find the function that applies loyalty discounts. Reply with a compact JSON object containing keys file and symbol only.
Which checkout function calls chargePayment? Reply with JSON containing file and symbol.
Find where inventory is reserved during checkout. Reply with JSON containing the function and file.
Which route maps to submitOrder? Reply with JSON containing route, file, and symbol.
Find the retry helper used by payment charging. Reply with JSON containing file and symbol.
Change the maximum cart item limit from 25 to 50. Do not change tests. Run npm test when done.
Change the free shipping threshold from 7500 cents to 10000 cents. Do not change tests. Run npm test when done.
Change the sales tax rate from 0.08 to 0.075. Do not change tests. Run npm test when done.
Allow checkout results to use status "queued" instead of "pending" in the CheckoutResult type. Do not change runtime status "paid". Run npm test when done.
Change payment retry attempts from 3 to 4 in the chargePayment flow only. Do not change tests. Run npm test when done.
